events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes transformers (dry-type & pad-mount) at rough-complete stage. Photos show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, and terminations are in place. Inspection card has no open correction notes. References: NEC Art. 450, 250.30.

This seems like a pass - everything is in place, no corrections noted, follows the detail.
